nasb.text: Then the Lord said to Moses, “Take for yourself spices, stacte and onycha and galbanum, spices with pure frankincense; there shall be an equal part of each.

esv.text: The Lord said to Moses, “Take sweet spices, stacte, and onycha, and galbanum, sweet spices with pure frankincense (of each shall there be an equal part),

cnv.text: 耶和華對摩西說：“你要取芬芳的香料，就是蘇合香、香錠、白松香；這芬芳的香料和純淨的乳香，各樣都要分量相等。

ccb.text: 耶和华对摩西说：“要取各种芬芳的香料，就是苏合香、香螺、白松香和纯乳香，分量相同，
